{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/technology-combinations/combinations/27-hybrid-rag-with-ast-chunked-code.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Комбинация 27: Hybrid RAG with AST-Chunked Code


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Комбинирование технологий для новых свойств - Claude}} (корень репозитория).{quote}
_Проекты:_ Hybrid RAG

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Комбинирование технологий для новых свойств - Claude}} (корень репозитория).{quote}

Родители:

ASTChunk (structural code chunking)

Graph-RAG (precedent linking)

Crawl4AI (corpus building)

ClickHouse (columnar analytics)

Дети:

Code + legal precedents unified knowledge base

Knowledge base components:
1. Legal decisions (Crawl4AI → ClickHouse)
2. Automation scripts (ASTChunk → vector DB)
3. Graph links (§§ citations + code references)

Query: "How to calculate Widerspruchsfrist for KSV Bescheid?"

Retrieval:
* Graph-RAG: finds precedents citing SGG § 84
* ASTChunk: finds code implementing deadline calc
* ClickHouse: aggregates historical processing times

Output: 
* Legal basis (precedents)
* Implementation (code)
* Statistics (average duration)

Self-documenting legal corpus

Every code chunk links to relevant precedents

Every precedent links to implementation code

Graph shows: Legal rule → Code → Test cases → Decisions

ROI: Developer understands legal context, lawyer sees implementation

Уникальность: First hybrid knowledge graph combining legal texts + code. ASTChunk makes code semantically searchable. Bridges gap between legal theory and practice.



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [03-dsl-ast|docs/technology-combinations/mega-stacks/03-dsl-ast.md]
* [26-ast-based-code-analysis-for-legal-automation|docs/technology-combinations/combinations/26-ast-based-code-analysis-for-legal-automation.md]
* [10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline|docs/technology-combinations/combinations/10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline.md]
* [25-30-extended|docs/technology-combinations/synthesis-tables/25-30-extended.md]




----

* [22-russian-international-oss-stack|docs/technology-combinations/combinations/22-russian-international-oss-stack.md] (сходство 0.24)
